Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Gloria]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Gloria is a doll that could warn Kai of Valin's strikes.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Gloria is a doll with a painted wooden face and white hair tied in an ornate bun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Gloria possesses a mental voice that sounds like it is coming through a long tunnel filled with whispering wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Gloria communicates with Simon mentally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Gloria is a doll that translates for Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Gloria is a doll.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Gloria's chest was cracked and her hair and dress were torn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Gloria was sitting nearby with her hair and dress ruined.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
